title: [Mem2Reg] Local signal does not dominate final drive

features.name: signal driven in unreachable block after probe
features.description: Code should include a signal that is probed in one block and then driven (with timing delay) in a different block that is unreachable due to no predecessor

features.name: local signal declaration in unreachable block
features.description: Code should include a local signal declaration inside a block that has no predecessors and is unreachable from entry
